market_overview.headline: Market in consolidation mode with SPY pulling back to 21W support while QQQ shows unstacked bullish structure and BTC remains deeply bearish.
market_overview.detail: 36% of stocks remain Full Bull but momentum is cooling with pullbacks outnumbering breakouts. Finance sector remains split near neutral while Energy Minerals and Electronic Technology lead sector strength.

momentum_themes.headline: Electronic Technology & Energy Minerals Drive Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic Technology stocks showing 20%+ spreads led by memory and semiconductor equipment plays. Energy Minerals posting strongest sector performance with 100% bull participation.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy & Materials Dominate, Tech Services Struggles

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with 13.64% average gains above 21W.
Mining and materials sector showing complete bull dominance.
Semiconductor complex mixed but leading momentum acceleration.

weakest.note: Software and services severely lagging with broad bear structure.
Complete bearish participation across business services names.
Auto and luxury goods showing continued weakness.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from high-multiple tech services into cyclical materials and energy plays. Finance sector remains conflicted as the pivot point.

items.text: SPY showing crossover compression with 8W/13W bearish cross risk - watch for breakdown below 21W support
BTC in Full Bear structure down -16.9% vs 21W could signal broader risk-off if crypto correlation returns
Technology Services sector breakdown (-81.8% net score) may pressure broader tech if it spreads to hardware
32 Bull Breakdown names suggest underlying trend deterioration despite surface strength
